question: Are organic pesticides safer than conventional ones?
topic: Addresses widespread misconception about organic farming practices and pesticide use

sources.name: Pesticide Registration Manual - Biopesticides and Pollution Prevention Division — EPA
Pesticides — NIH/National Institute of Environmental Health Sciences

discovery_sources.text: Organic pesticides can require higher application rates and have greater environmental impact than some conventional alternatives - claim needs verification against NASEM pesticide reports
discovery_sources.origin: Unbiased Science: The Joy of Cooking (For Kids Who Are ‘Picky’ Eaters)
